svg.title: Attack surface and low-hanging fruit pipeline with coverage tracker
svg.desc: Six-phase pipeline with a separate coverage tracker box to the right of verification, with a re-run loop back to the hunters.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the orchestrator manage this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the scope recon agent do?')
g.text: Domains, IPs, CIDRs, ASNs, org footprint

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the service discovery agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the web and API surface agent look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the network services surface agent look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the cloud and infra surface agent look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the supply chain surface agent look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the misconfiguration hunter look for?')
sendPrompt('What does the known CVE hunter look for?')
sendPrompt('How does the verification agent confirm or discard findings?')
sendPrompt('How does the coverage tracker decide what to re-run?')
sendPrompt('What does the attack surface report contain?')
g.text: Surface map · confirmed findings · coverage · PoC refs

svg.text: State: scope.json · services.json · surface.json · findings.json · coverage.json
